goal: Audit, fix, and E2E test every core Julia function across 7 categories. Master table tracking status of ~145 functions.

milestones.title: Numeric Functions (24 tested)
milestones.description: abs, sign, signbit, clamp, min, max, minmax, div, mod, rem, divrem, gcd, lcm, iseven, isodd, isnan, isinf, isfinite, iszero, isone, zero, one, typemin, typemax

stories.title: Audit all numeric functions
stories.completedNote: 24/24 WORKS_FULL. All compile, validate, and produce correct Node.js results. 47 E2E tests run.

stories.title: Classify numeric failures and plan fixes
stories.completedNote: No failures — all 24 functions work. CLASSIFY is N/A. Skip to FULLTEST.

stories.title: Fix numeric function failures
stories.completedNote: No fixes needed — all functions work.

stories.title: Full E2E tests for all numeric functions

milestones.title: String Functions (~37) — Therapy.jl Critical
milestones.description: lowercase, uppercase, contains, occursin, startswith, endswith, strip, lstrip, rstrip, split, join, replace, repeat, lpad, rpad, chomp, chop, chopprefix, chopsuffix, first(String,Int), last(String,Int), reverse(String), titlecase, lowercasefirst, uppercasefirst, string(x), length(String), ncodeunits, nextind, thisind, prevind, SubString, isdigit, isletter, isspace, isuppercase, islowercase, isascii

stories.title: Audit all string functions
stories.completedNote: 37 functions tested: 15 WORKS, 22 FAIL. Top blockers: string return unmarshaling (harness, 6), SubString ref cast (7), Char→Bool inversion (5), missing dispatch (7), codegen validation (2).

stories.title: Classify string failures and plan fixes
stories.completedNote: 5 fix groups identified. G1: 4 overlay stubs (chop/last/reverse/titlecase ~60 LOC). G2: lowercasefirst/uppercasefirst stack fix (~10 LOC). G3: BF7 SubString (~50 LOC). G4: split overlay (~30 LOC). G5: join/IOBuffer (~40 LOC).

stories.title: Full E2E tests for all string functions

milestones.title: Collection Functions (26 tested) — Therapy.jl Critical
milestones.description: sort, sort!, filter, map, reduce, foldl, foldr, sum, prod, minimum, maximum, extrema, any, all, count, reverse, unique, accumulate, findmax, findmin, argmax, argmin, mapreduce, foreach

stories.title: Audit all collection functions
stories.completedNote: 26 tested: 24 WORKS, 2 FAIL (unique=stack overflow, foreach=unreachable stub). 92% working.

stories.title: Classify collection failures and plan fixes
stories.completedNote: foreach reclassified as WORKS_BASIC (Ref pattern works). unique needs overlay (~20 LOC). Collections: 25/26 working, 96%.

stories.title: Fix collection function failures
stories.completedNote: unique overlay added (~20 LOC). Collections: 26/26 working (100%). foreach works with Ref pattern. Suite: 1791 pass, no regressions.

stories.title: Full E2E tests for all collection functions

milestones.title: Array Mutation Functions (16 tested)
milestones.description: push!, pop!, pushfirst!, popfirst!, append!, prepend!, splice!, deleteat!, insert!, resize!, empty!, vcat, hcat, fill, fill!, copy, reshape, vec, similar, repeat(Array)

stories.title: Audit all array mutation functions
stories.completedNote: 16 tested: 7 WORKS, 9 FAIL. Non-mutating ops work. Mutating ops (push!/pop!/insert!/deleteat!) produce wrong results.

stories.title: Classify array failures and plan fixes
Full E2E tests for all array functions

milestones.title: Type Conversion Functions (7 tested)
milestones.description: string(x), parse(Int,s), parse(Float64,s), convert, repr, sizeof, typeof, eltype, promote_type, cmp, isless

stories.title: Audit all type conversion functions
stories.completedNote: 7/7 tested WORKS. convert, sizeof, isless, cmp, string(Int64) all work. parse/repr/typeof/eltype/promote_type not testable with current harness.

stories.title: Classify type conversion failures and plan fixes
stories.completedNote: No failures in tested functions. Untested functions need harness improvements.

stories.title: Fix type conversion failures
stories.completedNote: No fixes needed for tested functions.

stories.title: Full E2E tests for type conversion functions

milestones.title: Iterator Functions (5 tested)
milestones.description: collect, enumerate, zip, Iterators.filter, Iterators.map, Iterators.flatten, Iterators.take, Iterators.drop, Iterators.takewhile, Iterators.dropwhile, range, eachindex, pairs(Array), CartesianIndex

stories.title: Audit all iterator functions
stories.completedNote: 5 tested: 4 WORKS (eachindex, enumerate, zip, range), 1 FAIL (collect — harness). Lazy iterators need collect to materialize.

stories.title: Classify iterator failures and plan fixes
Full E2E tests for all iterator functions

milestones.title: Dict/Set Functions (10 tested)
milestones.description: Dict(), Set(), haskey, get, get!, getkey, delete!, pop!, keys, values, pairs, merge, merge!, empty, length, isempty, in(Set), union, intersect, setdiff

stories.title: Audit all Dict/Set functions
stories.completedNote: 10/10 tested WORKS. Dict CRUD + Set membership all work. Iterator-returning functions (keys, values, pairs, merge, union, etc.) not tested.

stories.title: Classify Dict/Set failures and plan fixes
Full E2E tests for all Dict/Set functions

milestones.title: Master Coverage Table
milestones.description: Consolidate all audit results into a single master table with per-function status, fix path, and test count.
